mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_document (id, knowledge_base_id, filename, original_filename, mime_type, size_bytes, storage_path, parse_status, content_hash, failed_reason, indexed_at, retry_count, metadata, deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{id} AS uuid), CAST(#{knowledgeBaseId} AS uuid), #{filename}, #{originalFilename}, #{mimeType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{storagePath}, #{parseStatus}, #{contentHash}, #{failedReason}, #{indexedAt}, #{retryCount}, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{deleted}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, knowledge_base_id, filename, original_filename, mime_type, size_bytes, storage_path, parse_status, content_hash, failed_reason, indexed_at, retry_count, metadata::text AS metadata, deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_document WHERE knowledge_base_id = CAST(#{knowledgeBaseId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, knowledge_base_id, filename, original_filename, mime_type, size_bytes, storage_path, parse_status, content_hash, failed_reason, indexed_at, retry_count, metadata::text AS metadata, deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_document WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update:
UPDATE knowledge_document
knowledge_base_id = CAST(#{knowledgeBaseId} AS uuid),
filename = #{filename},
original_filename = #{originalFilename},
mime_type = #{mimeType},
size_bytes = #{sizeBytes},
storage_path = #{storagePath},
parse_status = #{parseStatus},
content_hash = #{contentHash},
failed_reason = #{failedReason}, indexed_at = #{indexedAt}, retry_count = #{retryCount},
metadata = CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb),
deleted = #{deleted},
updated_at = #{updatedAt}
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM knowledge_document WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
